---
title: "Telco's intern"
author: "Bastien Baranoff"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: true
    number_sections: true
  html_document:
    toc: true
    df_print: paged
lang: fr
always_allow_html: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 18,
  fig.height = 14,
  dpi = 150,
  fig.align = "center"
)

library(DiagrammeR)

# Fonction pour convertir DOT en PNG pour PDF
render_graphviz <- function(dot_code) {
  if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
    temp_dot <- tempfile(fileext = ".dot")
    temp_png <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
    
    writeLines(dot_code, temp_dot)
    system(paste("dot -Tpng", shQuote(temp_dot), "-o", shQuote(temp_png)))
    
    if (file.exists(temp_png)) {
      knitr::include_graphics(temp_png)
    }
  } else {
    grViz(dot_code)
  }
}
```


![](pictures/couverture.png)


# Un livre sur mon expérience en radio-télécommunications

J'espère que vous apprécierez.

```{r child='master/intro.Rmd'}
```{r child='master/ubuntu_install.Rmd'}
```{r child='telephony/methodo.Rmd'}
```{r child='telephony/networks.Rmd'}
```{r child='telephony/ss7.Rmd'}
```{r child='LoRa/lora.Rmd'}
```{r child='telephony/attacks.Rmd'}
```{r child='misc/dst80.Rmd'}
```{r child='misc/tea1.Rmd'}
